sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46969" key="*(hmerasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἡμερασία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἥμερος</etym>) epith. of Artemis in Arcadia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:18:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.18.8</biblScope> </bibl>:</entryFree>
